column1: Paste your measurement data in columns A and B below:
1. Copy your voltage and current measurements into columns A and B (rows 6-18)
2. The formulas in columns D-G will automatically calculate runtime for different battery capacities
3. Adjust battery capacity values in column D as needed
4. Add more voltage steps if needed (copy formulas down)
Note: This uses simple averaging. For more accurate results use the Python script.
